---
id: accept-an-invitation-register-or-login
title: "Accept an invitation (register or login)"
description: "If the invited email already has an account, this logs them in and adds them to the workspace."
sidebar_label: "Accept an invitation (register or login)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Accept an invitation (register or login)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/auth/invite/{token}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



If the invited email already has an account, this logs them in and adds them to the workspace.
If not, a new account is created.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
